exampleSentences: Cho dù trời mưa, anh vẫn sẽ đến gặp em tối nay.
Em sẽ cố gắng hết sức cho dù bài tập này rất khó.
Cho dù không có nhiều tiền, chị vẫn muốn đi du lịch.
notes:
cho dù = even though / no matter if. It shows contrast: one thing happens, but the result is still true.

It’s a linking phrase (conjunction) connecting two clauses. The second clause often has vẫn to stress “still”.

Very close to mặc dù, but cho dù often feels stronger, like “no matter what the situation is.”

translation.en: I will do it even if it's difficult.

content.sentence: Tôi sẽ làm điều đó ___ khó khăn.

notes_md:
**cho dù** = *even though / no matter if*. It shows contrast: one thing happens, but the result is still true.

It’s a linking phrase (conjunction) connecting two clauses. The second clause often has **vẫn** to stress “still”.


Very close to **mặc dù**, but *cho dù* often feels stronger, like “no matter what the situation is.”

definitions.en: A phrase used to express 'even if' or 'regardless of'.
definitions.es: Una frase utilizada para expresar 'incluso si' o 'sin importar'.
definitions.vi: Một cụm từ được sử dụng để diễn đạt 'cho dù' hoặc 'bất kể'.

example.en: Even if it rains, I will still walk to school.
example.es: Incluso si llueve, todavía caminaré a la escuela.
example.vi: Cho dù trời mưa, tôi vẫn đi bộ đến trường.

content.sentence: Tôi sẽ đi ___ trời có mưa.

translation.en: I will go even if it rains.

exampleSentencesTranslated: Even though it rains, I will still come to see you tonight.
I will try my best even though this homework is very difficult.
Even though she does not have much money, she still wants to travel.
